name: Scotch Shortbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat butter until soft.
2. Add powdered sugar and almond extract, then beat until smooth.
3. Mix in flour and salt until well combined.
4. Press dough evenly into a 11 x 7 x 2-inch pan.
5. Mark the dough with 1-1/2 inch squares using a fork.
6. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 25 minutes.
7. Cut along the markings while hot.
8. Allow to cool in the pan.
